channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wolfurt
item.description: Due to an interlocking fault am Bahnhof, no journeys are currently possible in Wolfurt Bahnhst. No information can be provided about the duration of the interruption. [Since 11.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to an interlocking fault am Bahnhof, no journeys are currently possible in Wolfurt Bahnhst. No information can be provided about the duration of the interruption.
[Since 11.07.2026]

item.title: Wien Schottentor: Schottenring from crossing Universitätsring and Schottengasse and bulkhead passage to crossing Heßgas
item.description: In the working area the tram operation is stopped. [13.07.2026 – 07.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the working area the tram operation is stopped.
[13.07.2026 – 07.08.2026]

item.title: 59A: roadworks
item.description: Because of roadworks, the 59A buses are redirected. [13.07.2026 – 10.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks, the 59A buses are redirected.
[13.07.2026 – 10.07.2027]

item.title: 31: No operation between Stammersdorf and Friedrich-Engels-Platz
Atzgersdorfer Straße from Pantlitschkogasse to Wastlgasse
item.description: The stop of the public transport concerned is temporarily moved from Atzgersdorfer Straße at the level of 42 to Atzgersdorfer Straße at the level of 46. [13.07.2026 – 05.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the public transport concerned is temporarily moved from Atzgersdorfer Straße at the level of 42 to Atzgersdorfer Straße at the level of 46.
[13.07.2026 – 05.09.2026]

item.title: Frauenstiftgasse from Baumergasse to Brünner Straße and Siemensstraße
item.description: For further information on the transfer of the public transports concerned, please refer to the information provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. [13.07.2026 – 22.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
For further information on the transfer of the public transports concerned, please refer to the information provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG.
[13.07.2026 – 22.09.2026]

item.title: Meidlinger Hauptstraße from Edelsinnstraße and Eichenstraße to Sechtergasse
item.description: In the construction site area, a residual runway with 3,50 is kept free. [14.07.2026 – 15.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the construction site area, a residual runway with 3,50 is kept free.
[14.07.2026 – 15.08.2026]

item.title: 15A: Gadnergasse # Swatoschgasse
item.description: Because of roadworks the line 15A is redirected. Period: Tuesday, 14. July 2026, approximately 06:30 watch for expected one week. [09.07.2026 – 09.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks the line 15A is redirected. Period: Tuesday, 14. July 2026, approximately 06:30 watch for expected one week.
[09.07.2026 – 09.07.2027]

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Gramatneusiedl
item.description: Due to construction works, between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl Station from 03.102026 to 04.10.2026 the train REX64(2679) from 03. to 04.102026 to 04. to 05.10.2026 the … [Since 08.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Vienna Hbf (U) and Gramatneusiedl Station from 03.102026 to 04.10.2026 the train REX64(2679) from 03. to 04.102026 to 04. to 05.10.2026 the …
[Since 08.07.2026]

item.title: Floridsdorfer Brücke from Am Rollerdamm to Friedrich-Engels-Platz
item.description: The driveway to the A22 towards the south is not possible during this period.The line 31 is short-run in the period from 06.07.2026 to 16.08.2026 and runs only … [06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The driveway to the A22 towards the south is not possible during this period.The line 31 is short-run in the period from 06.07.2026 to 16.08.2026 and runs only …
[06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
